meeting.viewHistoryHint: Shows past meeting transcripts and translations
meeting.openSettingsHint: Configure bundled models and meeting preferences
meeting.readinessModelNotReady: Speech recognition model not ready. Please wait for preparation to complete.
meeting.readinessTranslatorOptional: Translation model is optional. Install it to enable in-meeting translation.
meeting.readinessTranslatorMissing: Translation may take a moment to initialize when the meeting starts.
meeting.readinessTranslatorInit: Translation model will initialize when the meeting starts.
meeting.stopConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to stop this meeting?
meeting.packNotDownloadedMessage: Real-time translation will not work in the meeting because language packs have not been downloaded.
meeting.startMeetingSettingsHint: Go to Settings to configure the model
meeting.transcriptEmptyOfflineMessage: Offline mode — transcript continues on device.
meeting.transcriptEmptyIdleMessage: Start a meeting to see the live source transcript here.
meeting.transcriptEmptyListeningMessage: Speak in English, Japanese, Korean, or Chinese to start the live transcript.
meeting.translationOfflineMessage: Translation is temporarily unavailable. On-device translation will resume automatically.
meeting.translationDegradedOptionalMessage: Some optional processing is temporarily limited. Translation continues normally.
meeting.translationDegradedUnavailableMessage: Translation is temporarily unavailable. Please wait a moment and try again.
meeting.translationWaitingSubtitleRecording: Incoming speech will appear here in your target language.

settings.title: Settings
settings.appLanguageDesc: Language used for the app interface.
settings.targetLanguageDesc: Translate all meeting output into this language.
settings.translationEngineDescIos: Uses Apple Translate for on-device meeting translation.
settings.translationEngineDescAndroid: Uses Opus-MT for on-device meeting translation.
settings.speechRecognitionDesc: SenseVoice bundled for offline EN / JA / KO / ZH speech recognition.
settings.sectionAiModelsSubtitle: Speech recognition and speaker detection are stored locally on your device.
settings.modelSummaryDesc: Core speech models are installed locally. Translation uses the device-native engine.
settings.sectionLanguagePacksSubtitle: Apple Translation packs stored offline on this device. ~30MB per pack.
settings.iosVersionWarningDesc: Apple Translation requires iOS 18 or later. This device runs iOS {{version}} — translation will not work.
settings.settingThemeDesc: Choose how the app appears across all screens.
settings.sensitivityDescription: Lower values detect more speaker changes; higher values merge similar speakers. Adjust based on meeting size and speaking patterns.
settings.storageOfflineNote: Audio, transcripts, and translations stay on this device. Removing the app deletes locally stored data.
settings.deleteAllSessionsMessage: Permanently delete all meeting sessions, transcripts, and translations? This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteSessionsErrorMessage: Failed to delete all sessions. Please try again.
settings.developerModeDesc: Show performance metrics overlay during meetings.
settings.developerUnlockMessage: Advanced diagnostics and tuning options are now visible.
settings.developerDiarizationDesc: Fine-tune clustering parameters for speaker identification
settings.onDeviceAiSubtitle: Models ship with the app and are prepared locally when needed. No network download. No AI analysis lane.
settings.modelStorageBody: Local model preparation preserves absolute privacy: transcript, translation, and model inference stay inside the app sandbox.
settings.modelRemoveMessage: Remove {{name}} from local prepared storage? Bundled app resources remain available for preparing again later.
settings.sectionVoiceOutputSubtitle: Read translated speech aloud through earphones.

history.emptyStateSubtitle: Your meeting history will appear here
history.sessionDeleteHint: Long press to delete this session
history.sessionDeleteMessage: This cannot be undone. All transcripts and translations will be permanently deleted.
history.sessionDeleteErrorMessage: Failed to delete session. Please try again.

splash.langPackSelectionBody: Choose the languages you want for translation. Packs run completely offline after download.
splash.langPackNote: ~30MB per pack · Download once · Works offline
splash.langPackFailedMessage: Some packs could not be downloaded, possibly due to network connectivity. Successfully downloaded packs will be kept when retrying.
